name: ADDENTAX GROUP CORP.
business: Addentax Group Corp. is a Nevada holding company that conducts operations through subsidiaries in garment manufacturing, logistics services, and consulting services. It also owns Keemo Fashion Group which engages in apparel trading and digital publishing. The company sells to garment wholesalers, trading companies, and high-net-worth individuals seeking cross-border services.
sellsTo: middle-to-high income families and cross-border business owners for consulting

exposures.sentence: Our garment manufacturing business consists of sales made principally to wholesalers located in the PRC.
Our logistics business consists of delivery and courier services covering 45 cities in 10 provinces and 2 municipalities in China.
We provide business consulting and coordination services to customers seeking overseas wealth planning, insurance-related information and related cross-border service support.

KMFG operates two core business segments: ... a digital publishing business conducted through its wholly owned subsidiary, GW Reader Sdn. Bhd. in Malaysia, which operates a mobile-based online fiction platform utilizing a pay-per-chapter microtransaction model for global readers.

KMFG operates two core business segments: (i) an apparel and garment trading business focused on the wholesale distribution of men's and women's apparel to distributors primarily in China, sourcing directly from manufacturers without maintaining its own production facilities.

catalysts.sentence: We expect to develop 20 additional logistics routes in existing serving cities and improve the Company's profits by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Time Is Loan Limited
catalysts.sentence: On May 15, 2026, we completed the transaction contemplated by a Share Exchange Agreement ... to acquire 100% of the equity interests of Time Is Loan Limited.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Riches Family Office Limited
catalysts.sentence: On June 15, 2026, we completed the transaction contemplated by a Share Exchange Agreement ... to acquire 41.67% of the issued and outstanding equity interests of Riches Family.
